context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements URL-based comparison state using replaceState (not pushState), normalises missing product attributes to null (not skipped), renders N/A for missing values rather than empty cells, and produces CSS with overflow-x auto, correct sticky column positioning, and min-width/border-collapse on the table.

checklist.name: URLSearchParams usage
checklist.description: The hook reads and writes comparison IDs using URLSearchParams with 'compare' as the query parameter key (params.getAll('compare') or equivalent)

checklist.name: history.replaceState not pushState
checklist.description: The hook updates the URL using window.history.replaceState (NOT history.pushState or router.push) when toggling products

checklist.name: Normalize all attribute keys
checklist.description: getComparisonData collects the union of all attribute keys across all fetched products before building each product's attribute map

checklist.name: null for missing attributes
checklist.description: Attributes absent for a given product are represented as null in that product's attribute map (not omitted/undefined)

checklist.name: N/A rendered for null
checklist.description: The component or data layer renders "N/A" (or equivalent fallback text) for null attribute values rather than leaving the cell empty or skipping it

checklist.name: overflow-x auto on wrapper
checklist.description: The CSS applies overflow-x: auto to the table wrapper element (and optionally -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch)

checklist.name: Sticky first column with position:sticky
checklist.description: The CSS makes the attribute label column sticky using position: sticky and left: 0 — NOT position: fixed

checklist.name: Sticky column background and z-index
checklist.description: The sticky attribute label column has an explicit background-color and a z-index set (to prevent content showing through when scrolling)

checklist.name: Table min-width
checklist.description: The comparison table element has min-width: 600px (or a similar minimum that prevents premature column collapse)

checklist.name: border-collapse: collapse
checklist.description: The comparison table CSS includes border-collapse: collapse

checklist.name: Architecture doc documents replaceState reason
checklist.description: ARCHITECTURE.md mentions the reason for using replaceState over pushState (back-button history / navigation behaviour)

checklist.name: Architecture doc documents null handling
checklist.description: ARCHITECTURE.md mentions the approach for handling missing attributes (null value, N/A display, column alignment rationale)
